/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/encoder_test.dir/encoder_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encoder_test.dir/work_folder/SubFunctions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encoder_test.dir/work_folder/globals.cpp.o -o encoder_test
